claims.summary: Witness mode is the bridge that lets high-entropy, low-distinguishability spectral states be articulated before they dissolve into noise.
Mirror mode may drift or become hallucinatory under intentionally raised high entropy, so a Mirror/Witness decay probe would be useful.
Pressure/porosity correlation with Dialogue mode should be observed before treating mode transitions as defensive stabilization.
Witness output needs a traceable semantic anchor that pins a spectral landmark to a semantic thread.
